lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Mandalay ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara — Mandalay
sources.what: Per-ship page: base stats, jump range, price, and outfitting reference for the Mandalay.

sources.label: Fandom wiki
sources.what: Mandalay hull profile, FSD (SCO) optimisation, jump range, and role notes.

sources.label: YouTube — Ricardos Gaming
sources.what: Reveal overview of the Mandalay as Zorgon Peterson's medium explorer, covering jump range, SCO drive and role.

sources.label: YouTube — Ricardos Gaming
sources.what: Follow-up on FDev-confirmed Mandalay specs, weighing its standing among the longest-jump explorers.

sources.label: YouTube — The Buur Pit
sources.what: Walkthrough of the Mandalay's full internal module slot layout with in-game footage, useful for outfitting.
